discount_threshold.quote_span: Where Customer makes a Multi-Year Commitment, Provider shall apply a discount of fifteen percent (15%) to the list pricing otherwise applicable under that SOW for its entire term.

renewal_term.quote_span: this Agreement shall automatically renew for successive twelve (12) month terms (each a "Renewal Term") unless either party provides written notice of non-renewal at least forty-five (45) days prior to the end of the then-current term. Fees payable under any SOW in effect during a Renewal Term shall increase by three percent (3%) over the prior term's rates
